name: 04 — Social Media Promotion Agent (FB + IG + TikTok + Pinterest + YouTube)

nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Receive from Publishing Agent
nodes.notes: This webhook receives the product data from Workflow 3. Copy this URL and paste into Workflow 3's trigger step.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Enrich Social Content with URLs
nodes.notes: Injects real product URLs into all social media captions before posting.

nodes.name: 📘 Post to Facebook Page
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: (1) Create Facebook App at developers.facebook.com (2) Get Page Access Token with pages_manage_posts permission (3) Replace YOUR_PAGE_ID and YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN

nodes.name: 📸 Instagram — Create Media Container
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Instagram Content Publishing API. Uses same Meta App as Facebook. Replace YOUR_IG_USER_ID and YOUR_INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN. image_url must be a publicly accessible URL of your product image.

nodes.name: 📸 Instagram — Publish Post
nodes.notes: Second step of Instagram publishing. Uses the container ID from previous step to publish the post.

nodes.name: 🎵 Post to TikTok
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Apply for TikTok Content Posting API at developers.tiktok.com. NOTE: TikTok API requires a video file URL. For automation, pre-generate a short video using CapCut (free) or use a static image video tool. Replace YOUR_TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN and YOUR_VIDEO_URL_HERE.

nodes.name: 📌 Post to Pinterest
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Create Pinterest App at developers.pinterest.com. Get access token with pins:write scope. Replace YOUR_PINTEREST_ACCESS_TOKEN, YOUR_PINTEREST_BOARD_ID, and YOUR_PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL.

nodes.name: ▶️ Schedule YouTube Short
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: YouTube Data API v3. OAuth2 with youtube.upload scope. NOTE: This initiates the upload metadata. You need a pre-created Shorts video file URL. Use Google Cloud Console to set up OAuth credentials.

nodes.name: 📊 Collect Social Results
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all social platform APIs.

nodes.name: 📊 Log Social Posts to Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs all social post results to the Social_Posts_Log tab for tracking and analytics.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Weekly Dashboard
nodes.notes: Updates the master Weekly_Dashboard tab so you have a one-stop view of everything that happened.

meta.description: Phase 4: Social media promotion agent. Triggered by webhook from Workflow 3. Posts simultaneously to Facebook, Instagram (2-step), TikTok, Pinterest, and YouTube Shorts. Logs all results to Google Sheets.
